issue_title: scroll is not triggered properly if scrolled quickly
issue_body_preview:
Scroll does not gets triggered if I scroll down to the bottom quickly. The event does not get triggered if I wait at the bottom of the page much beyond `infiniteScrollThrottle`. However, It gets triggered if I scroll up from the bottom of the page.

But, if I scroll down slowly, the event is being
test_description_zh: 在使用 ngx-infinite-scroll 的长列表页面中，快速滚动到页面底部，观察无限滚动事件是否被正确触发并加载更多内容。分别测试：1) 快速滚动到底部；2) 在底部等待一段时间；3) 缓慢滚动到底部，对比三种场景下的加载行为。
expected_result_zh: 无论滚动速度快慢，当用户滚动到页面底部时，无限滚动事件都应正确触发，自动加载并显示更多内容。快速滚动到底部后无需额外操作（如向上滚动再向下滚动）即可触发加载。
